In Carry Over Budget, you roll over any leftover money from the previous month into the new one. Useful if your income or expenses change each month.

Backup Options

database Manual backup

Backup data on your device

No automatic sync across devices. Data is stored locally, and clearing browser cache deletes your data.

sync Automatic backup

Backup data on your Google Drive

Connect using the same account on other devices for automatic sync. Mobile/tablet needs to be reconnected after one hour.
